channel.title: The Mutapa Times
channel.description: Business and intelligence newspaper delivering curated Zimbabwean news from foreign press for the diaspora.

item.title: Fuel cheats in Zera crosshairs as crackdown begins @zimsituation
item.description: Source: Fuel cheats in Zera crosshairs as crackdown begins -Newsday Zimbabwe THE Zimbabwe Energy Regulatory Authority (Zera) has warned fuel service stations charging above regulated pump prices that they risk prosecution, as the regulator intensifies nationwide compliance inspec #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation

item.title: Zinara on course to clear US$11,6m loan by year end @zimsituation
item.description: Source: Zinara on course to clear US$11,6m loan by year end – herald Dr George Manyaya Freeman Razemba Senior Reporter THE rehabilitation of the Plumtree-Mutare Highway between 2012 and 2015 and dualisation of key sections will be fully paid for by the end of the year when the Zi #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation

item.title: RBZ policy rate cut: Will banks lower lending rates? @zimsituation @ReserveBankZIM
item.description: Source: RBZ policy rate cut: Will banks lower lending rates? – herald Tapiwanashe Mangwiro BANKS are expected to gradually reduce ZiG lending rates following the Reserve Bank of Zimbabwe’s decision to lower the Bank Policy Rate by 5 percentage points, a move aimed at aligning mon #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation

item.title: “A condemnation to slavery” – domestic workers slam US$90 minimum wage
item.description: The Zimbabwe Domestic and Allied Workers Union (ZDAWU) has condemned the government’s newly gazetted minimum wages for domestic workers, describing them as “poverty wages” that fail to address the sector’s economic hardships. Government approved revised minimum wages for domestic workers and employees in unclassified operations on June 16, 2026, with immediate effect. Under the new [...] The post “A condemnation to slavery” – domestic workers slam US$90 minimum wage appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Constitution Defenders Forum calls for CAB3 to be scrapped, alleges vote tainted by bribery
item.description: The Constitution Defenders Forum (CDF) has called for the immediate withdrawal of Constitutional Amendment Bill No. 3, describing Parliament’s passage of the controversial legislation as flawed and tainted by bribery and undue influence. Following the passage of the bill in the National Assembly, CDF convenor Tendai Biti expressed concern over lawmakers’ failure to conduct a [...] The post Constitution Defenders Forum calls for CAB3 to be scrapped, alleges vote tainted by bribery appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Govt appeals for support to repatriate Zimbabweans from South Africa ahead of June 30 deadline
item.description: GOVERNMENT has appealed to the private sector, humanitarian organisations, development partners, churches and well-wishers for additional support in its efforts to repatriate Zimbabwean nationals currently gathered at various centres in South Africa ahead of June 30. Anti-migrant groups in South Africa have issued a June 30 deadline for illegal foreigners to leave the neighbouring country. [...] The post Govt appeals for support to repatriate Zimbabweans from South Africa ahead of June 30 deadline appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Zimbabwe platinum producers owed $228mln in unpaid export earnings
item.description: Zimbabwe’s government owes platinum miners $228 million in unpaid export income under ​its foreign currency ⁠retention system, exerting pressure on a sector recovering from a price ‌collapse, an industry executive said on Friday. The southern African country requires all exporters to convert ​30% of their proceeds into local currency via government channels, but the government [...] The post Zimbabwe platinum producers owed $228mln in unpaid export earnings appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: This prosecution should never have happened – ZimInd editor Zaba recounts year of trauma after acquittal
item.description: Zimbabwe Independent editor Faith Zaba says the criminal case against her “should never have happened” after the High Court quashed charges stemming from a satirical article critical of President Emmerson Mnangagwa, ending nearly a year of prosecution that she says left her traumatised and stripped of her dignity. “I am delighted and deeply relieved by [...] The post This prosecution should never have happened – ZimInd editor Zaba recounts year of trauma after acquittal appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Music Industry Titan Clive Davis Dies at 94, Leaving an Enduring Legacy Across Hip-Hop and R&B
item.description: NEW YORK – Legendary music executive Clive Davis, the visionary record industry architect whose career helped launch and shape some of the most influential artists in modern music, has died at the age of 94. Davis passed away on Monday at his Manhattan home, bringing to a close a remarkable career that spanned more than [...] The post Music Industry Titan Clive Davis Dies at 94, Leaving an Enduring Legacy Across Hip-Hop and R&B appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail

item.title: Messi sets World Cup scoring record as defending champion Argentina advances to knockout stage
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas — Lionel Messi set a World Cup record with his 17th and 18th goals, and defending champion Argentina advanced to the knockout stage with a 2-0 victory over Austria on Monday. Messi had a golden opportunity to break the record in the ninth minute, but went wide to the right on a penalty [...] The post Messi sets World Cup scoring record as defending champion Argentina advances to knockout stage appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail

item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: The Polygamist’s Global Conquest: How a Bulawayo Lula Lula Story Secretly Conquered the Netflix World
item.description: On a crisp evening in mid-June 2026, the global entertainment landscape witnessed an unprecedented cultural shift. Millions of viewers across the globe sat glued to their screens as a 22-episode supernovela titled The Polygamist broke its way into Netflix’s global non-English Top 10 chart, racking up an astonishing 19.1 million viewing hours in its debut [...] The post The Polygamist’s Global Conquest: How a Bulawayo Lula Lula Story Secretly Conquered the Netflix World first appeared on My Zimbabwe News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: My Zimbabwe News

item.title: Emotional Chipezeze Comforted After Magesi FC Relegation Blow @263Chat
item.description: Veteran Goalkeeper Left Heartbroken as Magesi’s Survival Fight Ends in Tears If there’s one thing football teaches us, it’s that goals can hurt. Nobody understands that feeling quite like Zimbabwe international Elvis Chipezeze right now. The goalkeeper was relegated from the South African top flight [...] The post Emotional Chipezeze Comforted After Magesi FC Relegation Blow appeared first on 263Chat. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: 263chat

item.title: Zimbabwe Government Meets Chinese Construction Engineers for Mt Hampden New City Development Plans
item.description: BEIJING — Zimbabwe is intensifying its drive to secure strategic infrastructure partnerships for its flagship New City development in Mt Hampden, with fresh discussions held in Beijing between the country’s delegation and the China State Construction Engineering Corporation (CSCEC) China State Construction Engineering Corporation. The engagement, led by the Minister of Finance, Economic Development and [...] The post Zimbabwe Government Meets Chinese Construction Engineers for Mt Hampden New City Development Plans appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail

item.title: Chamisa rejects CAB3 finality, but offers no clear plan to block amendment @nehandaradio @nelsonchamisa
item.description: Nelson Chamisa has rejected claims that CAB3 is a foregone conclusion, arguing that Zimbabweans remain the ultimate decision-makers even after the controversial Bill cleared a major hurdle in Parliament. The post Chamisa rejects CAB3 finality, but offers no clear plan to block amendment appeared first on Nehanda Radio. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews

item.title: Quiet Money, Deep Roots: How the Oak Foundation Backs Zimbabwe’s Communities
item.description: The Geneva-based Oak Foundation has funded Zimbabwean causes since 1983. In 2025 its Zimbabwe programme made USD 7.9 million in grants, backing palliative care, landmine clearance, regenerative farming and care for children who have lost parents. #Zimbabwe #Policy #ZimbabwePolicy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Tapiwa Hillary Phillipo
